Anthropic’s latest feud with the Trump admin may actually help it, sales data suggests
articles.summary: Anthropic's popularity with business users is growing so well that the latest beef with the government might actually boost it, data from Ramp suggests.

articles.title: Android 17 launches with new multitasking tools as Google expands Gemini features
articles.summary: Google has released Android 17 and Wear OS 7, introducing new multitasking features, parental controls, security tools, and smartwatch upgrades. The launch is also accompanied by a Pixel Drop that brings Google’s latest AI models to its devices.

articles.title: Sixty percent of US consumers say ‘AI’ in brand messaging is a turnoff, survey finds
articles.summary: WordPress VIP’s latest survey suggests consumers are wary of AI-generated answers even as companies increasingly view AI search as an important referral channel.

articles.title: DOJ claims xAI’s unpermitted gas turbines are a matter of ‘national, economic, and energy security’
articles.summary: The Justice department says the Pentagon needs xAI to keep using its unpermitted gas turbines.

articles.title: Plaud says its software business topped $100M in ARR after shipping over 2M AI notetakers
articles.summary: Plaud is trying to make a mark in a crowded market full of AI-powered meeting notetakers.

articles.title: Robinhood’s note on 10% layoffs shows blaming AI isn’t cutting it
articles.summary: Unlike many of his tech industry peers who have cut thousands of jobs citing the need to restructure to make the most of AI, Robinhood's CEO Vlad Tenev conspicuously made no mention of AI in his note about layoffs.

articles.title: Probably raises $9M to build a more reliable kind of AI
articles.summary: Probably wants to prevent hallucinations and factual errors from reaching users, and achieve accuracy on par with deterministic systems.

articles.title: ChatGPT’s market share slips below 50% for first time
articles.summary: The chatbot still remains the most popular AI assistant worldwide with over 1.1 billion monthly users, followed by Gemini with 662 million and Claude with 245 million.

articles.title: Malaysia’s AI agent-powered messaging app Respond.io raises $62.5M, eyes acquisitions
articles.summary: Respond.io, one of Malaysia's startups to watch, uses AI agents to handle high volumes of customer inquiries and charges per convo, not per seat.

articles.title: Sundar Pichai faces boos, walkout at Stanford graduation ceremony over Google’s Israel, ICE ties
articles.summary: AI is once again at the heart of a college graduation protest — this time for the technology's use in Google's defense contracts.

articles.title: The US government’s Anthropic models ban was never about an AI jailbreak
articles.summary: The Trump administration's decision that forced Anthropic to pull its latest cybersecurity models could be reactionary, retaliatory, or both, but the message is clear: The AI industry isn't immune from U.S. government interference.

articles.title: Meta’s new ‘AI Mode’ on Facebook pulls from public info across its platforms
articles.summary: Meta announced Monday that it's rolling out a wave of new AI features on Facebook, the latest sign of the company's effort to catch up in the AI race and keep users more engaged on the platform.

articles.title: Cybersecurity vets protest ‘dangerous’ US government ban on Anthropic’s most powerful models
articles.summary: A group made up of dozens of cybersecurity experts urged the White House to remove export-control restrictions on Anthropic’s Fable and Mythos models, arguing that the order is going to limit the ability of cybersecurity defenders to secure their software and products.

articles.title: Salesforce acquires AI customer service platform Fin for $3.6B
articles.summary: Salesforce says it wants to use Fin's team and technology to improve Agentforce, its existing enterprise platform that businesses can use to build custom AI agents that automate tasks.

articles.title: Sarvam becomes India’s newest AI unicorn with $234 million funding round led by HCLTech

articles.title: As AI agents become employees, NewCore emerges with $66M to give them identities
